basic_details.job_title: Perambalur District Law Officers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Perambalur District has officially announced the Law Officers Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt. No. D2/8884/2026. Candidates who are Advocates with not less than seven years standing at the bar can now submit their offline applications up to 25 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocates with not less than seven years standing at the bar.
qualification.details: Advocates with not less than seven years standing at the bar.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Additional Government Pleader cum Additional Public Prosecutor

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Perambalur District Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: perambalur.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Perambalur District Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Law Officers posts in Perambalur District?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Law Officers posts in Perambalur District is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Law Officers in Perambalur District?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies available for Law Officers in Perambalur District.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Law Officers posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is being an advocate with not less than seven years standing at the bar.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Law Officers posts?
faq.answer: The job type for the Law Officers posts is contract-based.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is D2/8884/2026.

faq.question: Q8. Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Perambalur District.

faq.question: Q9. What is the notification date for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date for this recruitment is 9th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.
